content:
Here is the weekly ASX X (Twitter) thread for the week of 6 July 2026:

Post 1

ASX closed at 8,547 pts last week as US tariff relief lifted sentiment, but the rally is running into a wall — RBA cut expectations have been repriced and the index is 2.1% below its April high. Mixed lean this week. #ASX #ausbiz

Post 2

🏦 Banks face net interest margin pressure as rate cut bets firm ahead of Thursday's RBA minutes. ⛏️ Mining watches iron ore at USD 98/t — a break below USD 95/t would pressure the majors hard. #banking #ironore #ASX

Post 3

🔺 RIO is the line in the sand this week. Iron ore at USD 98/t keeps it range-bound, but any Chinese stimulus signal could reprice the stock fast. Watch the USD 95/t floor. #mining #ironore #ausbiz

Post 4

S&P 500 closed at 5,572 pts Friday. US payrolls beat at 177k kept Fed cut hopes alive but not dominant. ASX takes its cue from whether that read hardens or softens into the week. #ASX #ausbiz #Fed

Post 5

RBA Minutes drop Thursday. Market prices one more 25bps cut by year-end. Hawkish surprise crushes rate-sensitives — banks and REITs sell off. Dovish read lifts property and growth. Which side are you on? #RBA #ausbiz #ASX

Post 1
📉 ASX 200 slipped 13.40 pts (0.15%) to 8,831.00 Monday — flat on the week but still 4.04% off its 52-week high. Health Care held the line while gold stocks gave back gains. #ASX #ausbiz

Post 2
Health Care led all sectors +1.50%, IT added +0.93%. On the other side, Utilities fell 0.79%, Materials dropped 0.63%, Consumer Staples shed 0.60%. Defensive rotation with a tech twist. #ASX #ausbiz

Post 3
🔺 WiseTech Global surged 7.31% to AUD 35.37 — the standout tech move of the session. Vault Minerals ran 11.62% to AUD 5.09, but gold names Genesis Minerals and Ramelius both shed over 3%. #ASX #tech

Post 4
🪙 Gold at AUD 6,012.69/oz with AUD/USD at 0.6932. Silver AUD 90.25/oz, Platinum AUD 2,452.25/oz. Elevated gold in AUD terms makes the selloff in gold miners today a notable divergence. #gold #metals #ASX

Post 5
Gold miners underperforming spot gold at AUD 6,012.69/oz is the key tension to watch. Do producers close that gap this week, or does the AUD strengthen and compress margins? What's your call? #gold #ASX #ausbiz
